topStories.description: Iran's envoy to Ukraine, Shahriar Amouzegar, dismissed the support Kyiv has offered to the United States and its Gulf allies, as Ukraine advertises its expertise in destroying Iranian-designed drones...

topStories.title: New York City detects first known case of severe Mpox strain, health department issues advisory – all you need to know
topStories.description: Mpox is an infectious disease that can cause symptoms such as a painful rash, swollen lymph nodes, fever, headache, muscle aches, back pain and fatigue. The first known case of a more severe strain of Mpox, known as Mpox clade I, was detected in New York City on Saturday

dailyNews.title: Inside Trump-Putin call - US rejected proposal to move Iran's enriched uranium to Russia to end conflict: Report
dailyNews.description: Russia had reportedly floated similar proposals during US-Iran nuclear negotiations last May, before the US and Israel attacked Iran's nuclear facilities in June, as well as in the weeks leading up to the current conflict

dailyNews.title: Why has the US targeted Iran's Kharg Island?
dailyNews.description: The tiny island is home to one of the most critical pieces of Iran's energy infrastructure.

dailyNews.title: Hamas urges key ally Iran to halt attacks on Gulf states
dailyNews.description: The Palestinian group also affirms Tehran's right to defend itself from "aggression" by the US and Israel.

dailyNews.title: More US Marines and warships being moved to Middle East, reports say
dailyNews.description: The reinforcements will come from an amphibious ready group that is usually based in Japan, an official told CBS, the BBC's US partner.

dailyNews.title: Iran to hit war-battered Ukraine next? Lawmaker says drone aid to Israel makes Kyiv ‘legitimate’ target
dailyNews.description: Since the start of the conflict in the West Asia, Iran has targeted seven other countries, in the Middle East, accusing them of providing assistance to the US. In a post on X, Ebrahim Azizi said that by providing drone support to Israel, Ukraine has ‘effectively become involved in the war.’

dailyNews.title: Motörhead guitarist Phil Campbell dead at 64
dailyNews.description: Phil Campbell, Motörhead's longest-serving guitarist who helped define the legendary metal band's iconic sound for over three decades, has died at 64.

dailyNews.title: Bill Maher presses Gov. Josh Shapiro on Iran war, asks if 'you would still do nothing?'
dailyNews.description: Bill Maher challenges Gov. Josh Shapiro on Iran policy during "Real Time" debate about nuclear weapons and Middle East military involvement.

dailyNews.title: Obama Presidential Center wants 100 unpaid volunteers as Valerie Jarrett earns $740K
dailyNews.description: Obama Presidential Center seeks 100 unpaid volunteers as $850M Chicago facility prepares to open in June, promising $3.1B economic impact for South Side.

dailyNews.title: Country singer Jo Dee Messina blasts Nashville label for ‘too fat’ rejection
dailyNews.description: Jo Dee Messina reveals Nashville record label rejected her for being "too fat" early in her career. The country singer says she's "still talking about it."

dailyNews.title: World Economic Forum faces fresh scrutiny as Epstein ties revive past scandals, criticism
dailyNews.description: The World Economic Forum faces renewed scrutiny after Epstein links surfaced, adding to years of controversy surrounding Davos, leadership scandals and criticism of the globalist agenda.

dailyNews.title: Stephen Colbert mocked by Variety over 'ego trip' as guests kiss his ring before May exit
dailyNews.description: Stephen Colbert's "Late Show" final season criticized by Variety correspondent Daniel D'Addario as transforming from resistance to ego trip with celebrity guests flattering the host.

topStories.title: Trump looking forward to attending UFC White House event featuring ‘all top’ fighters
topStories.description: Trump confirmed he'll attend the historic UFC Freedom 250 event at the White House on his 80th birthday where two championship bouts are scheduled to take place on the South Lawn.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Approves Ultra-Deepwater Oil Drilling Plan
dailyNews.description: The $5 billion project in the Gulf of Mexico is expected to help produce up to 10 billion barrels of oil by the end of this decade. Critics say it could endanger people and marine life.

dailyNews.title: Justice Dept. Legal Threat Complicates Trump’s Pick for Fed Chair
dailyNews.description: An investigation of the Federal Reserve was thwarted on Friday, but a department appeal could reimpose an obstacle in Kevin Warsh’s path.

dailyNews.title: Lobbyist Arrested in Extortion Attempt of Client Who Received a Trump Pardon
dailyNews.description: Josh Nass had recently represented Joseph Schwartz, a former nursing home executive who was convicted of tax crimes before being freed by the president late last year.

dailyNews.title: How Trump Officials Embraced an Animal Rights Campaign
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is curbing animal experiments in response to shifts in public opinion, technological advances, years of animal rights advocacy and the work of a conservative activist.

dailyNews.title: ‘This Spells Real Trouble for Republicans’
dailyNews.description: The Republican pollster Kristen Soltis Anderson joins E.J. Dionne Jr. and Robert Siegel to discuss Trump’s falling approval rating and what it portends for November.

dailyNews.title: Trump says military targets on Iranian island 'obliterated'
dailyNews.description: Trump says military targets on Iranian island 'obliterated'

dailyNews.title: FCC chair threatens networks' licenses as Trump criticizes Iran war coverage
dailyNews.description: Federal Communications Commission Chair Brendan Carr did not name specific networks, but his post included a reference to a Saturday morning Truth Social post from the president.

dailyNews.title: Tehran threatens to retaliate after U.S. attacks vital Iranian oil hub
dailyNews.description: President Trump's comments came shortly after he said that the U.S. military had conducted "one of the most power bombing raids" on a vital Iranian oil hub.

dailyNews.title: Trump thanks TSA agents working with no pay amid government shutdown
dailyNews.description: TSA officers faced their first full missed paycheck Friday.

dailyNews.title: Breaking down the U.S. strikes on Kharg Island
dailyNews.description: President Trump's announcement about strikes on Kharg Island has sparked more questions about the potential of U.S. military boots on the ground.

dailyNews.title: Judge blocks Trump administration's subpoenas against Fed Chair Powell
dailyNews.description: A federal judge blocked two grand jury subpoenas against Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell on Friday. Chief Judge James Boasberg wrote that "the Government has offered no evidence whatsoever that Powell committed any crime other than displeasing the President."

dailyNews.title: U.S. strikes key Iranian oil hub
dailyNews.description: President Trump said Friday night on social media that the U.S. struck a key Iranian oil hub on Kharg Island as tensions over the global oil supply ramp up amid Iran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz.
